testCases.title: Members List Pagination
testCases.notes: BuildRight org has only 3 members; precondition requires >10. Pagination control correctly absent for small member set, but load-more/pagination behavior cannot be verified without sufficient fixture data.

testCases.title: Invite Member - New Member Sign-In via Invitation Link
testCases.notes: Invitation sent to invite+smk-1780328727754@example.com which is not a real mailbox. Invitation acceptance link cannot be retrieved from storefront — requires email access or admin notification log. End-to-end acceptance flow is out of storefront scope for this runner.

testCases.title: Delegated Purchasing - Purchaser Order Goes to Approval
testCases.notes: Precondition unmet: BuildRight org has no approval workflow configured. Available roles (Organization employee, Purchasing agent, Organization maintainer) include no Approver role. Cannot verify approval threshold behavior without feature configuration.

testCases.title: Delegated Purchasing - Approver Sees Pending Orders
testCases.notes: Depends on MBR-013 fixture. No approver role exists in BuildRight org and no approval workflow configured.

testCases.title: Delegated Purchasing - Approve Order
testCases.notes: Depends on MBR-013/014 fixtures. No approver account or pending orders available.

testCases.title: Delegated Purchasing - Reject Order
testCases.notes: Depends on MBR-013/014 fixtures. No approver account or pending orders available.

testCases.title: Delegated Purchasing - Amount Threshold Triggers Approval
testCases.notes: Precondition unmet: no approval threshold configured for BuildRight org. Cannot test threshold boundary behavior (below vs above threshold).

testCases.title: Company Members Count Display
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] Member count shown on page (header or footer)
testCases.notes: No member count label visible anywhere on /company/members page. Table shows 4 rows (Carlos Rodriguez, Invite sent, Angela Foster, Elena Mutykova) but no count indicator in heading, table caption, or below the table. [MATH] and [FORMAT] count assertions cannot be evaluated.

bugs.title: Company Members page shows no member count indicator
bugs.failedAssertion: [DOM] Member count shown on page (header or footer)
bugs.stepsToReproduce:
1. Log in as BuildRight Org Admin (Carlos Rodriguez).
2. Navigate to /company/members.
3. Observe the page heading and table area.
bugs.expected: A member count (e.g. '4 members') is displayed on the page, either next to the heading or at the bottom of the table.
bugs.actual: No count indicator exists anywhere on the page. Only the table rows implicitly show the member count.
